name: AEye Inc. Warrant
summary: AEye Inc. Warrant entitles the holder to purchase one share of Class A common stock of AEye Inc. AEye Inc. is a developer of high-performance, active long-range LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) sensors for autonomous vehicles, advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS), and other applications. AEye Inc. is headquartered in Dublin, California.
